items.summary:
Update the Services page (frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx) to replace the existing sub-service items in the following 7 service category cards with the exact lists provided below. Do not change the card layout, design, icons, grid structure, or any other section of the page — only replace the sub-service bullet/list items within each card:

1. FSSAI License — replace existing sub-items with: FSSAI Registration, FSSAI State License, FSSAI Central License, FPO Mark Certification, FSSAI Annual Return Filing.

2. Trademark Registration — replace existing sub-items with: Trademark Registration, Trademark Objection / Opposition Reply, Trademark Hearing, Brand Name Registration, Design Registration, Copyright Registration, Patent Registration.

3. Pollution Control Board — replace existing sub-items with: CGWA Water Boring, CTE / CTO Certificate, EPR Registration, Plastic Waste Authorization, E-Waste Recycling Authorization, Biomedical Waste License, Hazardous Waste Management NOC, Solid Waste Management Authorization, Battery Waste Management, Ferrous & Non-Ferrous Import Pollution NOC.

4. Tender Services — replace existing sub-items with: GeM Registration, Vendor Assessment, Vendor Assessment OEM, Catalogue Upload on GeM, IREPS Registration, E-Procurement Registration, State Procurement Portal Registration, MSTC / E-Auction Portal Registration, Coal E-Auction Service, Tender Submission Service.

5. Digital Signature Certificate — replace existing sub-items with: Digital Signature (Organization), Digital Signature (Signing), Digital Signature (Signing + Encryption), DGFT Digital Signature, NRI Digital Signature.

6. Agreement & Contract — replace existing sub-items with: Non Disclosure Agreement, Partnership Deed, Residential Rent Agreement, Joint Venture Agreement, Commercial Rent Agreement, Affidavits, LLP Deed.

7. Small Business Support Service — replace existing sub-items with: Website Design, Logo Maker, Billing Software, Letter Pad Design, Visiting Card Design, Product Booklet, Business Booklet.

All sub-service items must be fully visible — no truncation, no 'show more' collapse, no items hidden. Each card's height must adjust dynamically based on its number of sub-services with no empty whitespace. The remaining 8 service cards (Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service) must remain exactly unchanged. Maintain the dark navy (#0a1628) background and golden yellow (#f5c518) accent styling. The layout must remain fully responsive (single column on mobile < 640px, multi-column grid on larger screens).
